sentences.target: Mon mari prend le bus ce matin.
sentences.reading: /mɔ̃ ma.ʁi pʁɑ̃ lə bys sə matɛ̃/

translations.fr: Mon mari prend le bus ce matin.
translations.ipa: /mɔ̃ ma.ʁi pʁɑ̃ lə bys sə matɛ̃/
translations.en: My husband takes the bus this morning.
translations.es: Mi marido toma el autobús esta mañana.
translations.de: Mein Mann nimmt heute Morgen den Bus.
translations.zh-Hans: 我丈夫今天早上坐公交车。
translations.ru: Мой муж сегодня утром едет на автобусе.
translations.pt: Meu marido pega o ônibus hoje de manhã.
translations.vi: Chồng tôi đi xe buýt sáng nay.
translations.nl: Mijn man neemt vanmorgen de bus.
translations.uk: Мій чоловік сьогодні вранці їде автобусом.
translations.hu: A férjem ma reggel busszal megy.
translations.hi: मेरा पति आज सुबह बस से जा रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój mąż jedzie dziś rano autobusem.
translations.el: Ο άντρας μου παίρνει το λεωφορείο σήμερα το πρωί.
translations.nb: Mannen min tar bussen i dag tidlig.
translations.id: Suami saya naik bus pagi ini.
translations.sv: Min man tar bussen i dag på morgonen.
translations.ro: Soțul meu ia autobuzul în această dimineață.
translations.cs: Můj manžel dnes ráno jede autobusem.
translations.da: Min mand tager bussen her til morgen.
translations.ja: 夫は今朝バスに乗ります。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; determiners the noun 'mari' (subject NP).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP 'Mon mari'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes direct object 'le bus'.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'bus'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'prend'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'matin' to form a temporal NP (adverbial).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of temporal NP 'ce matin' functioning as time adjunct.

sentences.target: Elle attend son mari devant le cinéma.
sentences.reading: /ɛl atɑ̃ sɔ̃ ma.ʁi dəvɑ̃ lə si.ne.ma/

translations.fr: Elle attend son mari devant le cinéma.
translations.ipa: /ɛl atɑ̃ sɔ̃ ma.ʁi dəvɑ̃ lə si.ne.ma/
translations.en: She is waiting for her husband in front of the movie theater.
translations.es: Ella espera a su marido frente al cine.
translations.de: Sie wartet vor dem Kino auf ihren Mann.
translations.it: Lei aspetta suo marito davanti al cinema.
translations.ko: 그녀는 영화관 앞에서 남편을 기다리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在电影院门口等她的丈夫。
translations.yue: 佢喺戲院門口等佢老公。
translations.ru: Она ждёт своего мужа у кинотеатра.
translations.pt: Ela está esperando o marido dela em frente ao cinema.
translations.he: היא מחכה לבעלה מול בית הקולנוע.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang đợi chồng trước rạp chiếu phim.
translations.nl: Ze wacht op haar man voor de bioscoop.
translations.uk: Вона чекає на свого чоловіка перед кінотеатром.
translations.hu: A férjére vár a mozi előtt.
translations.hi: वह सिनेमा के सामने अपने पति का इंतजार कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona czeka na męża przed kinem.
translations.el: Περιμένει τον σύζυγό της μπροστά από τον κινηματογράφο.
translations.nb: Hun venter på mannen sin utenfor kinoen.
translations.id: Dia menunggu suaminya di depan bioskop.
translations.sv: Hon väntar på sin man utanför biografen.
translations.ro: Ea își așteaptă soțul în fața cinematografului.
translations.cs: Čeká na svého manžela před kinem.
translations.da: Hun venter på sin mand foran biografen.
translations.ja: 彼女は映画館の前で夫を待っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject of 'attend'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive verb selecting direct object 'son mari'.
Possessive determiner, 3rd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'mari' (possessor's gender not marked).
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'attend'.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article, masculine singular; determiner of 'cinéma'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'devant'.

sentences.target: Nous invitons ton mari ce soir.

translations.fr: Nous invitons ton mari ce soir.
translations.es: Esta noche invitamos a tu marido.
translations.de: Wir laden deinen Mann heute Abend ein.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们今晚邀请你的丈夫。
translations.ru: Мы приглашаем твоего мужа сегодня вечером.
translations.pt: Nós vamos convidar seu marido hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Tối nay chúng tôi mời chồng bạn.
translations.nl: Vanavond nodigen we jouw man uit.
translations.uk: Ми запрошуємо твого чоловіка сьогодні ввечері.
translations.hi: आज रात हम तुम्हारे पति को बुला रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σήμερα το βράδυ προσκαλούμε τον σύζυγό σου.
translations.nb: I kveld inviterer vi mannen din.
translations.sv: I kväll bjuder vi in din man.
translations.ro: Diseară îl invităm pe soțul tău.
translations.da: I aften inviterer vi din mand.
translations.ja: 今夜、あなたの夫を招待します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of 'invitons'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; transitive, taking direct object 'ton mari'.
Possessive determiner, 2nd person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'mari'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'invitons'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; with 'soir' forms a temporal NP functioning as adverbial ('this evening/tonight').
Common noun, masculine singular; head of temporal NP 'ce soir' (adverbial).

sentences.target: Je cherche un cadeau pour mon mari.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ ka.do puʁ mɔ̃ ma.ʁi/

translations.fr: Je cherche un cadeau pour mon mari.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ ka.do puʁ mɔ̃ ma.ʁi/
translations.en: I’m looking for a gift for my husband.
translations.es: Busco un regalo para mi marido.
translations.de: Ich suche ein Geschenk für meinen Mann.
translations.it: Sto cercando un regalo per mio marito.
translations.ru: Я ищу подарок для своего мужа.
translations.pt: Estou procurando um presente para o meu marido.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một món quà cho chồng tôi.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een cadeau voor mijn man.
translations.uk: Я шукаю подарунок для свого чоловіка.
translations.hi: मैं अपने पति के लिए एक उपहार ढूँढ़ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω ένα δώρο για τον σύζυγό μου.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en gave til mannen min.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari hadiah untuk suami saya.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en present till min man.
translations.ro: Caut un cadou pentru soțul meu.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en gave til min mand.
translations.ja: 夫への贈り物を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of 'cherche'.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive, taking direct object 'un cadeau', plus PP 'pour mon mari' (beneficiary).

Preposition introducing a beneficiary prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner, 1st person singular, masculine singular; modifies 'mari'.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.
